title: Strike confirmed

This command must concentrate 100% of the available resources on degrading Russia’s warfighting potential even more. The commander in charge of this direction will be strong and certainly highly experienced. The second point. The assault...

At the same time, even in this case it is not worth...

At the same time, even in this case it is not worth...
description_uk: Ракеты для Patriot, вероятно, будут производиться в Германии, а не на территории Украины, пишет Reuters Источники агентства, знакомые с обсуждениями, сообщили, что новые ракеты-перехватчики, вероятно, будут произведены в Германии или другой европейской стране, где это безопаснее, а производство может быть перенесено на Украину после окончания войны. В то же время, даже в этом случае не стоит...

title: German companies launch serial production of Gereon unmanned ground...
title_en: German companies launch serial production of Gereon unmanned ground...
title_uk: Німецькі компанії запускають серійне виробництво безпілотних наземних літаків Gereon...
description: German companies launch serial production of Gereon unmanned ground systems for deliveries to Ukraine "In order to supply Gereon to Ukraine, we are ramping up production at our plant in Ulm. Thus, the strategic partnership with ARX Robotics makes a significant contribution to strengthening European defense policy by supporting Ukraine," said the general director of the DEUTZ defense division Gerre.
description_en: German companies launch serial production of Gereon unmanned ground systems for deliveries to Ukraine "In order to supply Gereon to Ukraine, we are ramping up production at our plant in Ulm. Thus, the strategic partnership with ARX Robotics makes a significant contribution to strengthening European defense policy by supporting Ukraine," said the general director of the DEUTZ defense division Gerre.
description_uk: Немецкие компании запускают серийное производство беспилотных наземных систем Gereon для поставок Украине "Чтобы поставить Gereon Украине, мы наращиваем производство на нашем заводе в Ульме. Таким образом, стратегическое партнерство с ARX Robotics вносит весомый вклад в укрепление европейской оборонной политики путем поддержки Украины", - заявил гендиректор оборонного подразделения DEUTZ Герре.

description: French billionaire Xavier Niel, owner of Ukraine’s Lifecell, becomes Vodafone’s largest shareholder. Xavier Niel, the French billionaire and owner of Ukraine’s third-largest telecom operator, has become the largest shareholder of the Vodafone Group after buying a 16.2% stake in the company, Niel’s investment vehicle Vega announced on July 10.
description_en: French billionaire Xavier Niel, owner of Ukraine’s Lifecell, becomes Vodafone’s largest shareholder. Xavier Niel, the French billionaire and owner of Ukraine’s third-largest telecom operator, has become the largest shareholder of the Vodafone Group after buying a 16.2% stake in the company, Niel’s investment vehicle Vega announced on July 10.

description: Polish defense minister fends off criticism over sending Patriot missiles to Ukraine. “I’d rather those missiles intercept projectiles over Ukraine than have Russian missiles ever reach Poland,” Polish Defense Minister Wladyslaw Kosiniak-Kamysz said.

title: Attack attack
title_en: Attack attack
description: Polishinel's secret is revealed: in Russia, for the first time, it was recognized that the shortage of gasoline is the result of attacks on refineries. Russian Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak said that the lack of fuel is due to the fact that oil refineries are out of order after the attacks. In the past, Russians were convinced that traffickers and speculators were to blame. And in general, everything is "under control." But it seems that the version about "themselves to blame" is no longer valid.
description_en: Polishinel's secret is revealed: in Russia, for the first time, it was recognized that the shortage of gasoline is the result of attacks on refineries. Russian Deputy Prime Minister Alexander Novak said that the lack of fuel is due to the fact that oil refineries are out of order after the attacks. In the past, Russians were convinced that traffickers and speculators were to blame. And in general, everything is "under control." But it seems that the version about "themselves to blame" is no longer valid.
description_uk: Секрет Полишинеля раскрыт: в россии впервые признали, что дефицит бензина — результат ударов по НПЗ Вице-премьер рф Александр Новак заявил, что нехватка топлива связана с тем, что нефтеперерабатывающие заводы выходят из строя после прилетов. Раньше россиян убеждали, что виноваты перекупщики и спекулянты. И вообще все «под контролем». Но, похоже, версия про «сами виноваты» уже не проходит.

Our first meeting in this direction will be in France, and it will be in the near future. Our task was to gather leaders, companies, national security advisers and present...
description_en: FREYA. This is our Ukrainian anti-ballistics. This project is an anti-ballistic system, which should be an analogue of the Patriot in terms of hitting ballistic targets, but a more mass-produced and cheaper system. This is a European model. description_uk: FREYA. Це наша українська антибалістика. Цей проєкт – це антибалістична система, яка повинна бути аналогом Patriot щодо збиття балістичних цілей, але більш масового виробництва і більш дешевою системою. Це європейська модель. Перша наша зустріч у цьому напрямку буде у Франції, і це буде найближчим часом. Нашим завданням було зібрати лідерів, компанії, радників з питань нацбезпеки і представити...

This means that now the oil and gas facilities of Western Siberia, pipelines, military plants and...

description: 🤖 NRK performed more than 16,600 missions at the front in a month 👥 Units of the Defense Forces of Ukraine performed more than 16,600 logistical and evacuation missions with the help of ground robotic complexes in June. Ground drones continue to replace the military in the most difficult areas of the front: delivering ammunition and food, as well as evacuating the wounded and dead. 🗒 Dynamics of missions by month: 🟡January – 7...

description_uk: 🤖 НРК виконали понад 16 600 місій на фронті за місяць 👥 Підрозділи Сил оборони України у червні виконали за допомогою наземних роботизованих комплексів понад 16 600 логістичних та евакуаційних місій. Наземні дрони продовжують заміняти військових на найскладніших ділянках фронту: доставляють боєприпаси й харчування, а також евакуюють поранених та полеглих. 🗒 Динаміка місій по місяцях: 🟡січень – 7...
